title: Sonic Frontiers & Extras Music Pack
description: 🎶Adds a variety of custom music from mostly Sonic Frontiers as well as various other Sonic games into Minecraft!
body:
****I DO NOT OWN ANY OF THE CUSTOM MUSIC ADDED: CREDITS GO TO SEGA®, SONIC TEAM, AND ALL OTHER ARTISTS INVOLVED IN MAKING FAN-MADE TRACKS.****
#
After playing through _Sonic Frontiers_ I realized a lot of the game's soundtrack could fit in very well into Minecraft!

This pack aims to add a variety of music from _Sonic Frontiers_ made to fit Minecraft as best as possible. As a result, some songs were repurposed to fit in a way that may not match _Sonic Frontiers_'s context. Due to the lack of songs that could replace **every** track in the game, some songs were replaced with fan-made renditions and music from other Sonic games such as _Sonic Colors_, _Sonic The Hedgehog (2006)_, and _Sonic Lost World_ that fit accordingly.
## Soundtrack List

**Overworld (Unfinished):**
- Calm1 (Minecraft) -> Kronos Island Mvt. 1
- Calm2 (Clark) -> Kronos Island Mvt. 2
- Calm3 (Sweden) -> Kronos Island Mvt. 3
- Hal1 (Subwoofer Lullaby) -> Kronos Island Mvt. 4
- Hal2 (Living Mice) -> Kronos Island Mvt. 5
- Hal3 (Haggstrom) -> Kronos Island Mvt. 6
- Hal4 (Danny) -> Agnes Island Mvt. 1 **(Fan OST - By 'Zakkujo' & 'SilentDreams')**
- Piano1 (Dry Hands) -> Kronos Island Mvt. 7
- Piano2 (Wet Hands) -> Ouranos Island
- Piano3 (Mice on Venus) -> Maybe If... - Amy Mvt.
- Nuance1 (Key) -> Blood Flow - Knuckles Mvt.
- Nuance2 (Oxygène) -> Another Passage - Tails Mvt.
- Infinite Amethyst -> Cutscene: Keep your head up
- Left to Bloom -> Theme of Starfall Islands
- Stand Tall -> Cutscene: Sonic on the move
- Wending -> Cutscene: Purifcation of Souls
- An Ordinary Day -> Theme of Koco
- Comforting Memories -> Second Wind - Sonic Mvt.
- Ancestry -> Cutscene: The Last Piece
- Floating Dream -> Ouranos Island Remix
- One More Day -> Cutscene: A Wonderful World
- A Familiar Room -> Theme of Starfall Islands Recreation **(Fan OST - By 'The Player')**
- **BONUS:** **Badlands and Deserts will exclusively play all Ares Island Mvt. tracks! (1.21 only)**


<details>
<summary>Missing Songs</summary>

These have been made silent in-game in the meantime until I can find suitable replacements.
- Bromeliad
- Crescent Dunes
- Echo in the Wind
- Firebugs
- Aerie
- Labyrinthine
- All other music added in 1.19, 1.20, and recently 1.21

</details>

**Underwater:**
- Axolotl -> Aquatic Base (Act 1) from *Sonic The Hedgehog (2006)*
- Dragon Fish -> Aquarium Park (Act 1) from *Sonic Colors*
- Shuniji -> Sea Bottom Segue from *Sonic Lost World*

**The Nether:**
- Nether1 (Concrete Halls) -> Chaos Island Mvt. 1
- Nether2 (Dead Voxel) -> Chaos Island Mvt. 2
- Nether3 (Warmth) -> Chaos Island Mvt. 3
- Nether4 (Ballad of the Cats) -> Chaos Island Mvt. 4
- Chrysopoeia -> Chaos Island Mvt. 5
- So Below -> Chaos Island Mvt. 6
- Rubedo -> Chaos Island Mvt. 7

**The End:**
- Boss -> I'm Here - Orchestral ver.
- **BONUS:** Boss -> I'm Here - Revisited (feat. Kellin Quinn)
- End (The End) -> Rhea Island
- **BONUS:** End (The End) -> Titan: GIGANTO
- Credits (Alpha) -> I'm with you - Vocal Ver. (feat. Gaby Borro)

**Main Menu:**
- All menu music -> I'm Here - Title Screen ver.

**Creative Mode:**
- Creative1 (Aria Math) - > Planet Wisp (Act 1) from *Sonic Colors*
- Creative2 (Biome Fest) -> Planet Wisp (Act 2) from *Sonic Colors*
- Creative3 (Blind Spots) -> Planet Wisp (Act 3) from *Sonic Colors*
- Creative4 (Dreiton) -> Planet Wisp (Act 2 - Remix) from *Sonic Colors: Ultimate*
- Creative5 (Haunt Muskie) -> Planet Wisp (Modern) from *Sonic Generations*
- Creative6 (Taswell) -> Planet Wisp (Act 1, 2 & 3) Remix - **(Fan OST - By 'SilentDreams')**

**Music Discs:**
- Cat -> Cyber Space 1-5: Dropaholic
- Mall -> Cyber Space 2-6: Transparent Highway
- Mellohi -> Cyber Space 4-1: Exceed Mach
- Stal -> Cyber Space 4-3: Rumble Rave
- Strad -> Cyber Space 4-6: Fog Funk
- 13 -> Cyber Space 4-8: No Pain, No Gain
- Relic -> Cyber Space 4-H: Wishes in The Wind Remix
- Wait -> Cyber Space 4-C: Arrow of Time Remix
- Ward -> Action Chain Challenge
- 11 -> Cutscene: One Last Wish
- Blocks -> Undefeatable
- Far -> Break Through It All
- Chirp -> Find Your Flame
- Otherside -> I'm with you
- Pigstep -> Sonic X Shadow Generations: Chaos Island Mock OST - **(Fan OST - By 'GDubA')**
- 5 -> One Way Dream
- Creator (Music Box) -> Cyber Space 1-2: Flowing
- Creator -> Cyber Space 1-2: Flowing + Jun Senou Style Guitars - **(Fan OST - By 'Sonic Guitars')**
- Precipice -> Cyber Space 1-1: Database + Jun Senou Style Guitars - **(Fan OST - By 'Sonic Guitars')**
  
### Important:
On versions 1.19.4 and higher, custom music discs no longer play in their entirety. This has been FIXED by installing [this mod!](https://modrinth.com/mod/jukebox-custom-disc-fix) Songs in music discs have also been intentionally mixed in stereo as well so that they can be heard regardless of distance from a jukebox.
## Bonus Features:
**Custom Boss Music:**

Several of Minecraft's boss mobs now feature custom boss music!

- The Wither -> I'm Here
- The Warden -> Enemy: WOLF

**Renamed Text:**

Some buttons and UI elements have been renamed to match _Sonic Frontiers_ a little bit more:
- Renamed a few screen buttons (Singleplayer -> Continue, Multiplayer -> Arcade Mode, etc.)
- Renamed gamemode text (Survival -> Base Form Mode, Creative -> Super Form Mode, etc.)
- The End Poem has been replaced with The End's speech from _Sonic Frontiers_


<details>
<summary>RECOMMENDED SETTINGS</summary>

If your Master Volume is at 100%:
- **Music Volume:** Volume 30%
- **Jukebox/Note Blocks:** Volume 12%

Those are my strong recommendations, but you are welcome to try your own to see what works best for you.
</details>




<details>
<summary>Known Issues</summary>

Current known issues:
- On versions 1.19.4 and higher, custom music discs no longer play in their entirety. This has been fixed on the latest version of the game with [this mod.](https://modrinth.com/mod/jukebox-custom-disc-fix)

</details>
